# thoth_billing_report (Data Source)

Reads the full billing report for a specific year and month.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `month` (Number) Billing report month (1-12).
- `year` (Number) Billing report year (for example: 2026).

### Read-Only

- `response_json` (String) Billing report payload as JSON.
